name: Body Zone Sports And Wellness Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Body Zone Sports And Wellness Complex in Reading, PA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Boyertown Community Park
description: Boyertown Community Park is a place to play pickleball in Boyertown, PA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Boyertown YMCA
description: Boyertown YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Boyertown, PA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Dill Dinkers
description: Come play pickleball at Dill Dinkers in Reading, PA! There are 6 indoor concrete and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and youth programming.
